name: Polygon Hell
short_description: A multiplayer PvE first person shooter where you have to kill hordes of animals and insects to save the world. Embark on a semi-Non-Euclidean journey to the unknown and make it difficult to follow your footsteps.
detailed_description:
Polygon Hell is a disorienting multiplayer first person shooter where you have to kill endless crowds of animals and insects.
In addition to the mass killing, you also have to complete epic quests, level up, unlock new items, fight big bosses, solve Non-Euclidean mazes, and discover hidden secrets.

Leverage a rich combat system to achieve your goals. Fly around with a magnet, hit enemies in the face with a shovel, gun down everything that moves, and if anyone is still alive after your massacre, you can blow them to pieces with a bomb.



Featuring:
  • 9 levels
  • Multiplayer with an in-game chat
  • An emotional questline with permanent choices - who will you betray?
  • Semi-Non-Euclidean
  • Impossible mazes
  • Bombs, shovels, magnets, and guns
  • Bees, spiders, pigs, rats, and other vermin.
  • Instant download (less than 256kb)

Get your mouse and keyboard today and make the tide turn
